title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Operations Management: Objectives, Operations
Management: Functions and Scope, Types of Production Systems, process
planning, make or buy decisions, process reengineering, Operations
Strategy.
Facility Planning, Factors Affecting Plant Location, Plant Location: Case
Study, location analysis techniques – location factor rating–center of
gravity technique – load distance technique.

title: Module 2
content:
Capacities and facilities: capacity planning, facility layout – objectives,
types of layout – process layout – product layout – fixed position layout –
cellular layout, systematic layout, planning, layout design procedures –
CRAFT – CORELAP – ALDEP.
Assembly line balancing: methods for line balancing – rank positional
weight method –COMSOAL.

title: Module 3
content:
Demand forecasting: need and uses of forecasting, components of
forecasting demand, time series methods – moving average – weighted
moving average – exponential smoothing – adjusted exponential smoothing
– linear regression – seasonal adjustments, forecast accuracy.
Aggregate planning: aggregate planning strategies

title: Module 4
content:
Materials requirement planning: objectives, master production schedule,
bill of materials, evolution from MRP to manufacturing resource planning
(MRP II).
production scheduling: objectives – processing characteristics and
constraints – performance measures, Gantt chart, single machine
scheduling
